metadata.title: [zh-tw] QuickAdd
metadata.description: QuickAdd 繁體中文化與微調
metadata.author: Chico

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Define reusable snippets referenced as {{GLOBAL_VAR:<name>}}. Snippets support other QuickAdd tokens and expand before VALUE/VDATE/etc.
ast.target: 定義可重複使用的片段，可用 {{GLOBAL_VAR:<name>}} 參照。片段支援其他 QuickAdd token，並會在 VALUE/VDATE 等之前展開。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source:
Name
Value
Actions
ast.target:
名稱
值
操作

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source:
Export QuickAdd Package

Select choices to bundle. Dependencies are added automatically.
ast.target:
匯出 QuickAdd 套件

選擇要打包的 choice。相依項目會自動加入。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.target: <tr class="svelte-x9dt2q"><th class="svelte-x9dt2q">名稱</th> <th class="svelte-x9dt2q">位置</th> <th class="svelte-x9dt2q">既有項目</th> <th class="svelte-x9dt2q">操作</th></tr>

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: No choices match the current filter.
ast.target: 沒有符合目前篩選條件的 choice。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: No choices found in this package.

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: No additional assets bundled with this package.
ast.target: 此套件未包含其他資產。

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 啟用（沒有目前檔案時略過）

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 自動（先嘗試提供者，失敗則使用 models.dev）

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Show updates only on major releases (new features, breaking changes)
ast.target: 只在重大版本顯示更新（新功能、破壞性變更）

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Show updates on each new release
ast.target: 每次新版本都顯示更新

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Override the global setting for this choice. 'Always' forces the one-page modal even if disabled globally; 'Never' disables it even if enabled globally.
ast.target: 覆寫此 choice 的全域設定。「一律」會強制使用單頁輸入視窗，即使全域已停用；「永不」會停用它，即使全域已啟用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How to arrange the new pane relative to the current one
ast.target: 新窗格相對於目前窗格的排列方式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How to display the opened file

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Focus the opened tab immediately after opening
ast.target: 開啟後立即聚焦到開啟的分頁

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Advanced / legacy: this executes any `<% %>` anywhere in the destination file (including inside code blocks).
ast.target: 進階／舊版：這會執行目的檔案中任何位置的 `<% %>`（包含程式碼區塊內）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls whether this Capture uses the current editor selection as {{VALUE}}. Does not affect {{SELECTED}}.
ast.target: 控制此 Capture 是否使用目前編輯器選取內容作為 {{VALUE}}。不影響 {{SELECTED}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative path. Supports format syntax (use trailing '/' for folders).
ast.target: 相對於儲存庫的路徑。支援格式語法（資料夾請在結尾加上 /）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose a file, folder, or format syntax (e.g., {{DATE}})
ast.target: 選擇檔案、資料夾或格式語法（例如 {{DATE}}）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose a card from the canvas below, or paste an exact node id.
ast.target: 從下方 canvas 選擇卡片，或貼上精確的節點 ID。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Formats the value as a task.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how QuickAdd should insert a link to the captured file in the current note.
ast.target: 選擇 QuickAdd 要如何在目前筆記中插入擷取檔案的連結。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to place the link when appending
ast.target: 附加時連結要放置的位置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Insert capture after specified text. Accepts format syntax. Tip: use a heading (starts with #) to target a section. Blank line handling is configurable below.
ast.target: 在指定文字之後插入擷取內容。可使用格式語法。提示：使用標題（以 # 開頭）可指定區段。空白行處理可在下方設定。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Insert captured content on the same line, immediately after the matched text (no newline added).
ast.target: 在同一行、符合文字之後立即插入擷取內容（不新增換行）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Replace everything after the matched text up to end-of-line.
ast.target: 取代符合文字之後到行尾的所有內容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Place the text at the end of the matched section instead of the top.
ast.target: 將文字放在符合區段的結尾，而不是開頭。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Also include the section’s subsections (requires target to be a heading starting with #). Subsections are headings inside the section.
ast.target: 也包含該區段的子區段（目標必須是以 # 開頭的標題）。子區段是該區段內的標題。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Creates the 'insert after' line if it is not found.
ast.target: 找不到「插入於其後」的行時建立該行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the format of the capture.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create the file in the specified folder. If multiple folders are specified, you will be prompted for which folder to create the file in.
ast.target: 在指定資料夾中建立檔案。若指定多個資料夾，系統會詢問要在哪個資料夾中建立檔案。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Get prompted to choose from both the selected folders and their subfolders when creating the note.
ast.target: 建立筆記時，從所選資料夾及其子資料夾中選擇。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Creates the file in the same folder as the currently active file. Will not create the file if there is no active file.
ast.target: 在目前作用中檔案的相同資料夾建立檔案。若沒有作用中檔案，則不會建立。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how QuickAdd should insert a link to the created file in the current note.
ast.target: 選擇 QuickAdd 要如何在目前筆記中插入新建檔案的連結。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose whether QuickAdd should ask what to do, update the existing file, create another file, or keep the existing file.
ast.target: 選擇 QuickAdd 要詢問處理方式、更新既有檔案、建立另一個檔案，或保留既有檔案。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The model the AI Assistant will use
ast.target: AI 助手要使用的模型

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name of the variable used to store the AI Assistant output, i.e. {{value:output}}.
ast.target: 用來儲存 AI 助手輸出的變數名稱，例如 {{value:output}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Positive values penalize new tokens based on their existing frequency in the text so far, decreasing the model's likelihood to repeat the same line verbatim. The default is 0.
ast.target: 正值會依目前文字中既有頻率懲罰新 token，降低模型逐字重複同一行的機率。預設為 0。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Positive values penalize new tokens based on whether they appear in the text so far, increasing the model's likelihood to talk about new topics. The default is 0.
ast.target: 正值會依 token 是否已出現在目前文字中懲罰新 token，提高模型談論新主題的機率。預設為 0。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to the file. Supports formatting like {{DATE}}, {{VALUE}}, etc.
ast.target: 檔案路徑。支援 {{DATE}}、{{VALUE}} 等格式語法。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose tab, split, window, or sidebar
ast.target: 選擇分頁、分割視窗、視窗或側邊欄

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Bring the opened file to the foreground
ast.target: 將開啟的檔案帶到前景

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add user script - type the name or click Browse
ast.target: 新增使用者腳本：輸入名稱或點擊瀏覽

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how this condition should be evaluated.
ast.target: 選擇此條件的評估方式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Name of the macro variable to inspect (without the $ prefix).
ast.target: 要檢查的巨集變數名稱（不含 $ 前綴）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How to compare the variable value.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How to interpret the comparison value.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative path to the JavaScript file.
ast.target: JavaScript 檔案相對於儲存庫的路徑。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Execute this macro when Obsidian starts
ast.target: Obsidian 啟動時執行此巨集

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shown in the choice picker search box when this multi choice opens. Leave blank to use the multi name.
ast.target: 此 multi choice 開啟時顯示在 choice 選擇器搜尋框中。留空則使用 multi 名稱。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add will append new models. Replace will overwrite existing models with the selected list.
ast.target: 「新增」會附加新模型。「取代」會用所選清單覆寫既有模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create any custom endpoint (OpenAI-compatible or otherwise)
ast.target: 建立任意自訂端點（相容 OpenAI 或其他格式）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The endpoint for the AI Assistant

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose where QuickAdd looks when browsing or syncing models for this provider.
ast.target: 選擇 QuickAdd 瀏覽或同步此提供者模型時要查找的位置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The providers for the AI Assistant

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The default model for the AI Assistant

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show status messages from the AI Assistant
ast.target: 顯示 AI 助手的狀態訊息

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 供開發者使用的 Git 資訊。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Bundle or import QuickAdd automations as reusable packages.
ast.target: 將 QuickAdd 自動化打包或匯入為可重複使用的套件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display a notification when content is captured successfully to confirm the operation completed.
ast.target: 內容擷取成功時顯示通知，以確認操作已完成。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display a notification when an input prompt is cancelled without submitting. Disable this to avoid extra notices when dismissing prompts.
ast.target: 輸入提示未送出即取消時顯示通知。停用後可避免關閉提示時出現額外通知。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use multi-line input prompt instead of single-line input prompt
ast.target: 使用多行輸入提示，而非單行輸入提示

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keep drafts when closing input prompts so they can be restored on reopen. Drafts are stored only for this session.
ast.target: 關閉輸入提示時保留草稿，以便重新開啟時還原。草稿只會儲存在本次工作階段。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, Capture uses the current editor selection as {{VALUE}} and may skip the prompt. When disabled, Capture always prompts for {{VALUE}}.
ast.target: 啟用時，Capture 會使用目前編輯器選取內容作為 {{VALUE}}，並可能略過提示。停用時，Capture 一律提示輸入 {{VALUE}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shortcodes for natural language date parsing. One per line: alias = phrase. Example: tm = tomorrow.
ast.target: 自然語言日期解析的短代碼。每行一個：別名 = 詞句。例如：tm = tomorrow。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This prevents the plugin from making requests to external providers like OpenAI. You can still use User Scripts to execute arbitrary code, including contacting external providers. However, this setting disables plugin features like the AI Assistant from doing so. You need to disable this setting to use the AI Assistant.
ast.target: 這會防止外掛向 OpenAI 等外部提供者發出請求。你仍可使用 User Scripts 執行任意程式碼，包括連線到外部提供者。不過，此設定會停用 AI 助手等外掛功能的外部請求。若要使用 AI 助手，必須停用此設定。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add QuickAdd icon to the sidebar ribbon. Requires a reload.
ast.target: 將 QuickAdd 圖示加入側邊欄 ribbon。需要重新載入。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The string used to join multiple LLM responses together. The default is a newline.
ast.target: 用來串接多個 LLM 回應的字串。預設為換行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The string used to separate chunks of text. The default is a newline.
ast.target: 用來分隔文字區塊的字串。預設為換行。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use editor selection as default value
ast.target: 使用編輯器選取內容作為預設值

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Create file if it doesn't exist

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Create in same folder as active file
ast.target: 建立於目前檔案的相同資料夾

ast.name: setName
ast.source: If the target file already exists

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use editor selection as default Capture value
ast.target: 使用編輯器選取內容作為 Capture 預設值

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 停用 AI 與線上功能

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Filter by card text, file path, or node id…
ast.target: 依卡片文字、檔案路徑或節點 ID 篩選…

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 依名稱或 ID 篩選

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source:
t = today
tm = tomorrow
yd = yesterday
ast.target:
t = 今天
tm = 明天
yd = 昨天

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Create file if it doesn't exist

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Browse and select a script file

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.target: 新增 AI 助手命令

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Target canvas file was not found.
ast.target: 找不到目標 canvas 檔案。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Open the target canvas and select exactly one card to use this action.
ast.target: 請開啟目標 canvas，並只選取一張卡片來使用此操作。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Canvas nodes are still loading. Wait a moment and try again.
ast.target: Canvas 節點仍在載入，請稍候再試。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not copy node id automatically.
ast.target: 無法自動複製節點 ID。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Consider subsections requires the target to be a heading (starts with #)
ast.target: 包含子區段要求目標必須是標題（以 # 開頭）

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Custom provider added. Click Edit to configure.
ast.target: 已新增自訂提供者。點擊「編輯」進行設定。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Select at least one choice to export.
ast.target: 請至少選擇一個要匯出的 choice。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Package copied with warnings. Review details below.
ast.target: 套件已複製，但有警告。請查看下方詳細資訊。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Enter a file path before saving.
ast.target: 儲存前請先輸入檔案路徑。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Package saved with warnings. Review details below.
ast.target: 套件已儲存，但有警告。請查看下方詳細資訊。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This package has already been imported.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Canvas capture skipped link insertion because no Markdown editor is focused.
ast.target: Canvas 擷取已略過連結插入，因為目前沒有聚焦的 Markdown 編輯器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Changes trailing digits only. Example: Draft009.md -> Draft010.md.
ast.target: 只變更尾端數字。例如：Draft009.md -> Draft010.md。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Keeps the original name and adds a duplicate marker. Example: Project Plan.md -> Project Plan (1).md.
ast.target: 保留原名稱並新增重複標記。例如：Project Plan.md -> Project Plan (1).md。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Leaves the file unchanged and opens the existing file.
ast.target: 保持檔案不變，並開啟既有檔案。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Mutual exclusion of insertAfter and writeToBottomOfFile settings. If insertAfter is enabled, writeToBottomOfFile is disabled. To support changes in settings UI.
ast.target: insertAfter 與 writeToBottomOfFile 設定互斥。若啟用 insertAfter，writeToBottomOfFile 會停用。用於支援設定介面變更。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Set version to the current plugin version.
ast.target: 將版本設為目前外掛版本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add default AI providers to the settings.
ast.target: 將預設 AI 提供者加入設定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Migrate legacy openFileInNewTab settings to new fileOpening format
ast.target: 將舊版 openFileInNewTab 設定遷移到新的 fileOpening 格式

ast.name: description
ast.source: Backfill missing file opening defaults for older choices
ast.target: 補齊舊 choice 缺少的檔案開啟預設值

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ensure every AI provider has a discovery mode so browsing works without models.dev
ast.target: 確保每個 AI 提供者都有探索模式，讓瀏覽功能不依賴 models.dev 也能運作

ast.name: description
ast.source: Move AI provider API keys into Obsidian SecretStorage
ast.target: 將 AI 提供者 API key 移入 Obsidian SecretStorage

ast.name: description
ast.target: 只包含已啟用命令的 choice

ast.name: error
ast.source: Multi choices are interactive and cannot be run via CLI.
ast.target: Multi choice 需要互動，無法透過 CLI 執行。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Missing required inputs for non-interactive CLI run.
ast.target: 非互動式 CLI 執行缺少必要輸入。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Multi choices are interactive and cannot be checked via CLI.
ast.target: Multi choice 需要互動，無法透過 CLI 檢查。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Tip: open this canvas and select one card to grab its id instantly.
ast.target: 提示：開啟此 canvas 並選取一張卡片，即可立即取得其 ID。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 使用已開啟 canvas 中的選取項目

ast.name: text
ast.target: 正在載入 canvas 節點…

ast.name: text
ast.source: No nodes match the current filter.
ast.target: 沒有符合目前篩選條件的節點。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Choose folder when creating a new note
ast.target: 建立新筆記時選擇資料夾

ast.name: text
ast.source: Exact for OpenAI models; estimates for others.
ast.target: OpenAI 模型為精確值；其他模型為估算值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to the folder where templates are stored. Used to suggest template files when configuring QuickAdd.
ast.target: 儲存範本的資料夾路徑。設定 QuickAdd 時會用來建議範本檔案。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Experimental. Resolve variables up front and show a single dynamic form before executing Template/Capture choices. See Advanced → One-page Inputs in docs.
ast.target: 實驗性功能。預先解析變數，並在執行範本／擷取 Choice 前顯示單一動態表單。請參閱文件中的「進階 → 單頁輸入」。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display release notes when a new version is installed. This includes new features, demo videos, and bug fixes.
ast.target: 安裝新版本時顯示版本資訊，包括新功能、示範影片與錯誤修正。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Format template variables as proper property types (Beta)
ast.target: 將範本變數格式化為正確的屬性類型（Beta）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, template variables in front matter will be formatted as proper Obsidian property types. Arrays become List properties, numbers become Number properties, booleans become Checkbox properties, etc. This is a beta feature that may have edge cases.
ast.target: 啟用後，front matter 中的範本變數會格式化為正確的 Obsidian 屬性類型。陣列會成為清單屬性、數字會成為數字屬性、布林值會成為核取方塊屬性等。此功能仍為 Beta，可能有邊界情況。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to your folder with prompt templates
ast.target: 提示範本所在的資料夾路徑

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The default system prompt for the AI Assistant
ast.target: AI 助手的預設系統提示

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enabling this will have the assistant use the prompt template you specify. If disable, the assistant will ask you for a prompt template to use.
ast.target: 啟用後，助手會使用你指定的提示範本。停用時，助手會詢問要使用哪個提示範本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The system prompt for the AI Assistant

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show advanced settings such as temperature, top p, and frequency penalty.
ast.target: 顯示進階設定，例如 temperature、top p 與頻率懲罰。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sampling temperature. Higher values like 0.8 makes the output more random, whereas lower values like 0.2 will make it more focused and deterministic. The default is 1.
ast.target: 取樣溫度。較高的值（如 0.8）會讓輸出更隨機；較低的值（如 0.2）會讓輸出更集中且穩定。預設值為 1。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Nucleus sampling - consider this an alternative to temperature. The model considers the results of the tokens with top_p probability mass. 0.1 means only tokens compromising the top 10% probability mass are considered. The default is 1.
ast.target: 核採樣，可視為 temperature 的替代設定。模型會考慮累積機率為 top_p 的 token 結果。0.1 表示只考慮機率最高的前 10% token。預設值為 1。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The maximum number of tokens in each chunk, calculated as the chunk token size + prompt template token size + system prompt token size. Make sure you leave room for the model to respond to the prompt.
ast.target: 每個區塊的 token 上限，計算方式為區塊 token 數 + 提示範本 token 數 + 系統提示 token 數。請預留模型回應提示所需的空間。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Merge chunks together by putting them in the same prompt, until the max tokens limit is reached. Useful for sending fewer queries overall, but may result in less coherent responses.
ast.target: 將多個區塊合併到同一個提示中，直到達到 token 上限。這有助於減少查詢次數，但回應可能較不連貫。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose whether replacing the selection should insert a link or an embed.
ast.target: 選擇取代選取內容時要插入連結或嵌入。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose whether to insert a regular link or an embed when replacing the selection.

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source:
Import QuickAdd Package

Select a package file, review conflicts, and choose how to import each item.
ast.target:
匯入 QuickAdd 套件

選擇套件檔案、檢查衝突，並選擇每個項目的匯入方式。

ast.name: setPlaceholder

ast.target: 在此貼上 .quickadd.json 套件內容

regex.source: setDesc("Override the global setting for this choice. 'Always' forces the one-page modal even if disabled globally; 'Never' disables it even if enabled globally.")
regex.target: setDesc("覆寫此 choice 的全域設定。「一律」會強制使用單頁輸入視窗，即使全域已停用；「永不」會停用它，即使全域已啟用。")

regex.target: setDesc("新窗格相對於目前窗格的排列方式")

regex.target: setDesc("開啟後立即聚焦到開啟的分頁")

regex.source: setDesc("Formats the value as a task.")
setDesc("Choose how QuickAdd should insert a link to the captured file in the current note.")
regex.target: setDesc("選擇 QuickAdd 要如何在目前筆記中插入擷取檔案的連結。")

regex.source: setDesc("Where to place the link when appending")
regex.target: setDesc("附加時連結要放置的位置")

regex.source: setDesc("Insert capture after specified text. Accepts format syntax. Tip: use a heading (starts with #) to target a section. Blank line handling is configurable below.")
regex.target: setDesc("在指定文字之後插入擷取內容。可使用格式語法。提示：使用標題（以 # 開頭）可指定區段。空白行處理可在下方設定。")

regex.source: setDesc("Insert captured content on the same line, immediately after the matched text (no newline added).")
regex.target: setDesc("在同一行、符合文字之後立即插入擷取內容（不新增換行）。")

regex.source: setDesc("Replace everything after the matched text up to end-of-line.")
regex.target: setDesc("取代符合文字之後到行尾的所有內容。")

regex.source: setDesc("Place the text at the end of the matched section instead of the top.")
regex.target: setDesc("將文字放在符合區段的結尾，而不是開頭。")

regex.source: setDesc("Also include the section\u2019s subsections (requires target to be a heading starting with #). Subsections are headings inside the section.")
regex.target: setDesc("也包含該區段的子區段（目標必須是以 # 開頭的標題）。子區段是該區段內的標題。")

regex.source: Notice("Consider subsections requires the target to be a heading (starts with #)")
regex.target: Notice("包含子區段要求目標必須是標題（以 # 開頭）")

regex.source: setDesc("Creates the 'insert after' line if it is not found.")
regex.target: setDesc("找不到「插入於其後」的行時建立該行。")

regex.source: setDesc("Set the format of the capture.")

setTooltip("Create file if it doesn't exist")

regex.source: setDesc("Get prompted to choose from both the selected folders and their subfolders when creating the note.")
regex.target: setDesc("建立筆記時，從所選資料夾及其子資料夾中選擇。")

regex.target: setName("建立於目前檔案的相同資料夾")

regex.target: setDesc("在目前作用中檔案的相同資料夾建立檔案。若沒有作用中檔案，則不會建立。")

regex.source: setDesc("Choose how QuickAdd should insert a link to the created file in the current note.")
regex.target: setDesc("選擇 QuickAdd 要如何在目前筆記中插入新建檔案的連結。")

regex.source: setName("If the target file already exists")
setDesc("Choose whether QuickAdd should ask what to do, update the existing file, create another file, or keep the existing file.")
regex.target: setDesc("選擇 QuickAdd 要詢問處理方式、更新既有檔案、建立另一個檔案，或保留既有檔案。")

regex.source: setDesc("The model the AI Assistant will use")
regex.target: setDesc("AI 助手要使用的模型")

regex.source: setDesc("The name of the variable used to store the AI Assistant output, i.e. {{value:output}}.")
regex.target: setDesc("用來儲存 AI 助手輸出的變數名稱，例如 {{value:output}}。")

regex.source: setDesc("Positive values penalize new tokens based on their existing frequency in the text so far, decreasing the model's likelihood to repeat the same line verbatim. The default is 0.")
regex.target: setDesc("正值會依目前文字中既有頻率懲罰新 token，降低模型逐字重複同一行的機率。預設為 0。")

regex.source: setDesc("Positive values penalize new tokens based on whether they appear in the text so far, increasing the model's likelihood to talk about new topics. The default is 0.")
regex.target: setDesc("正值會依 token 是否已出現在目前文字中懲罰新 token，提高模型談論新主題的機率。預設為 0。")

regex.target: setDesc("檔案路徑。支援 {{DATE}}、{{VALUE}} 等格式語法。")

regex.source: setDesc("Path to the folder where templates are stored. Used to suggest template files when configuring QuickAdd.")
regex.target: setDesc("儲存範本的資料夾路徑。設定 QuickAdd 時會用來建議範本檔案。")

regex.source: setDesc("Experimental. Resolve variables up front and show a single dynamic form before executing Template/Capture choices. See Advanced → One-page Inputs in docs.")
regex.target: setDesc("實驗性功能。預先解析變數，並在執行範本／擷取 Choice 前顯示單一動態表單。請參閱文件中的「進階 → 單頁輸入」。")

regex.source: setDesc("Display release notes when a new version is installed. This includes new features, demo videos, and bug fixes.")
regex.target: setDesc("安裝新版本時顯示版本資訊，包括新功能、示範影片與錯誤修正。")

regex.source: setName("Format template variables as proper property types (Beta)")
regex.target: setName("將範本變數格式化為正確的屬性類型（Beta）")

regex.source: setDesc("When enabled, template variables in front matter will be formatted as proper Obsidian property types. Arrays become List properties, numbers become Number properties, booleans become Checkbox properties, etc. This is a beta feature that may have edge cases.")
regex.target: setDesc("啟用後，front matter 中的範本變數會格式化為正確的 Obsidian 屬性類型。陣列會成為清單屬性、數字會成為數字屬性、布林值會成為核取方塊屬性等。此功能仍為 Beta，可能有邊界情況。")

regex.source: setDesc("Path to your folder with prompt templates")
regex.target: setDesc("提示範本所在的資料夾路徑")

regex.source: setDesc("The default system prompt for the AI Assistant")
regex.target: setDesc("AI 助手的預設系統提示")

regex.source: setDesc("Enabling this will have the assistant use the prompt template you specify. If disable, the assistant will ask you for a prompt template to use.")
regex.target: setDesc("啟用後，助手會使用你指定的提示範本。停用時，助手會詢問要使用哪個提示範本。")

regex.source: setDesc("The system prompt for the AI Assistant")
setDesc("Show advanced settings such as temperature, top p, and frequency penalty.")
regex.target: setDesc("顯示進階設定，例如 temperature、top p 與頻率懲罰。")

regex.source: setDesc("Sampling temperature. Higher values like 0.8 makes the output more random, whereas lower values like 0.2 will make it more focused and deterministic. The default is 1.")
regex.target: setDesc("取樣溫度。較高的值（如 0.8）會讓輸出更隨機；較低的值（如 0.2）會讓輸出更集中且穩定。預設值為 1。")

regex.source: setDesc("Nucleus sampling - consider this an alternative to temperature. The model considers the results of the tokens with top_p probability mass. 0.1 means only tokens compromising the top 10% probability mass are considered. The default is 1.")
regex.target: setDesc("核採樣，可視為 temperature 的替代設定。模型會考慮累積機率為 top_p 的 token 結果。0.1 表示只考慮機率最高的前 10% token。預設值為 1。")

regex.source: setDesc("The maximum number of tokens in each chunk, calculated as the chunk token size + prompt template token size + system prompt token size. Make sure you leave room for the model to respond to the prompt.")
regex.target: setDesc("每個區塊的 token 上限，計算方式為區塊 token 數 + 提示範本 token 數 + 系統提示 token 數。請預留模型回應提示所需的空間。")

regex.source: setDesc("Merge chunks together by putting them in the same prompt, until the max tokens limit is reached. Useful for sending fewer queries overall, but may result in less coherent responses.")
regex.target: setDesc("將多個區塊合併到同一個提示中，直到達到 token 上限。這有助於減少查詢次數，但回應可能較不連貫。")

regex.source: setDesc("This prevents the plugin from making requests to external providers like OpenAI. You can still use User Scripts to execute arbitrary code, including contacting external providers. However, this setting disables plugin features like the AI Assistant from doing so. You need to disable this setting to use the AI Assistant.")
regex.target: setDesc("這會防止外掛向 OpenAI 等外部提供者發出請求。你仍可使用 User Scripts 執行任意程式碼，包括連線到外部提供者。不過，此設定會停用 AI 助手等外掛功能的外部請求。若要使用 AI 助手，必須停用此設定。")

regex.target: setDesc("選擇取代選取內容時要插入連結或嵌入。")

regex.source:
innerHTML="

Import QuickAdd Package

Select a package file, review conflicts, and choose how to import each item.

"
regex.target:
innerHTML="
